name: Whole Wheat Honey-Walnut Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except liquids and yeast, inside the bread pan.
2. Add liquid ingredients: 7.5 fluid ounces of water and 1 teaspoon of dry yeast into the yeast holder.
3. Select WHOLE WHEAT BAKE MODE.
4. Press start. The timer will display 5:00.
